title: Algerian Ham Tagine
description: A keto twist on the traditional North African dish, featuring crispy ham and fresh spices.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the garlic, green chilies, and cook for 2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the diced tomatoes and cook for 3 minutes, until they start to break down.
Add the crispy ham, chopped cilantro, and chopped mint.
Stir in the Algerian spices and cook for 1 minute.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 15-20 minutes, until the flavors have melded together.
Serve hot, garnished with additional chopped cilantro and mint if desired.
